main.name: Srikar Kusumanchi
main.description: 15x Hackathon Winner and Recognized by Google Cloud and Wolfram Alpha
main.bio: A self-taught programmer with knowledge in many languages/frameworks such as Python, React Native, and JavaScript. Freelanced for two years creating web and mobile apps that have the common purpose of helping the public. Created applications that solve real-world problems in this era of digital transformation, such as widlifire awareness app and homework helper app. I have a deep passion for Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Web/Mobile development. Additionally, I have created many clones of big tech sites using React such as a Facebook Clone, Netflix Clone, Discord Clone, and more.
main.contactmessage: Love my work? Get in touch with me!

education.description: Obtained Honor's Roll in 9th Grade. Participated in Debate, DECA, Model UN/YIG, Science Bowl, and IoT Club.

work.title: Lead Application Developer
work.description: Using the power of deep learning to advance telemedicine, allowing for the early diagnosis of life-threatening diseases and comprehensive assessments of health with just a smartphone. Communicating with the machine learning and software development teams in the creation of CardiOS. Assisted in the development of NeurOS, a mobile app that helps diagnose patients of neuro disorders (Alzheimer's Disease, Parkinson's, etc.) by analyzing eye saccades.

work.title: Web Developer Intern
work.description: Helped build a demo customer portal which facilitated faster development of future projects. Cloned custom modules I have created from customer portals for reusability. Assisted with one-off requests as needed.

work.title: Lead SWE Intern
work.description: Edited and revised 30 hours worth of content to help aspiring developers learn quicker. Co-developing a website that will be used by thousands of students to sign up and learn Computer Science. Led a team of high school and college interns making the team 30 percent more productive.

work.title: Success Coach
work.description: Delegated tasks to ensure completion of projects on time. Guided peers in their journey of learning JavaScript. Develop innovative ways to aid in learning and add value to the course. Led group coaching calls where people learned React Native.

testimonials.text: Srikar has been one of the best freelancers I have ever had, his depth of knowledge in React Native is immense... I would definitely recommend you hire him for your next mobile app
